title: eriosema cordatum
intro: Eriosema cordatum, also known as the 'water bean', is a plant species native to tropical Africa, characterized by its bean-like pods and climbing habit. The plant has been reported to possess medicinal properties, including antibacterial, antifungal, and anti-inflammatory activities. The health benefits of Eriosema cordatum include its potential to treat various conditions, such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, due to its antiseptic and antipruritic properties. Traditionally, the plant's leaves, roots, or pods are prepared as infusions or decoctions for medicinal use, and it may also be used in the form of herbal teas or tinctures.
